title: Finalize total archive budget before release truth PR
rawUserRequest: 授权创建一个独立的预算修复 Work Item/PR；继续当前流程，但不要启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Pre-calibrate cumulative archiveGrowth governance budget before the authorized budget and release-truth lifecycle closures.

outOfScope: 工单 1 实现和执行计划内容
任何生产行为或发布流程变更

sources.reason: Current archiveGrowth budget and repayment records.
Current main already contains cumulative archiveGrowth 432.
Original budget PR adds one archived lifecycle record after rebase.
Final budget PR evidence confirms the cumulative-budget failure mode.

riskAssessment.reason: This changes only the governance archiveGrowth ceiling and records its authorized repayment.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized an independent budget repair before resuming the release-truth Work Item.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: max.archiveGrowth is 436, covering current main archiveGrowth 431 plus this archive, the original budget PR archive, Work Item 1, and the next serial archive margin.
The policy contains an explicit authorized repayment record and no Work Item 1, plan, production, or release behavior changes.
All required AI governance checks and project quality checks pass before archive and PR.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Current main has cumulative archiveGrowth 431. This Work Item, the original budget PR, and the next serial Work Items each require lifecycle archives, so the ceiling must be pre-calibrated to 436.
constraints: Change only .ai/guards/governance_complexity_policy.yaml and generated lifecycle evidence.
Do not start or modify Work Item 1 implementation.
Preserve existing archived evidence and use the full PR and ai-close-work-item lifecycle.
intent.rationale: Precomputing the complete near-term archive sequence prevents another budget-remediation loop while preserving fail-closed governance checks.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Cumulative archive budget includes this repair, the original budget PR, and Work Item 1.
Budget repair changes governance configuration only and does not start Work Item 1.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized creation of an independent budget repair Work Item/PR.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
